·   Hero Journey: Earn Ore Chests and tackle unique challenges on a brand-new reward track in the Hero Hall!
·   New Dark Elixir Troop: Ruin Witch crafts loyal Ruin Knights from the debris of destroyed buildings!
·   New Dark Elixir Spell: The Angry Spell raises the tempers of your troops, forcing them to target defenses temporarily.

com.dts.freefiremax.title: Free Fire MAX
com.dts.freefiremax.notes:
[Undersea Realm] Dive into the seabed in Bermuda and fight underwater! Try out the event weapon Hydro Blaster.
[New Character - Ray] Link to a target and knock them down when they're low on HP. A takedown resets the skill.  
[CS Random Events] Bigger starting funds, free Gloo Walls, and other random events shake up CS!
[Quick Messages] Smarter auto-trigger messages and pings for clearer comms.
[Pyro] Keep your fiery new companion active to level them up and unlock outfits.

com.MadOut.BIG.title: MadOut 2: 온라인 게임 RP 자동차 월드
com.MadOut.BIG.notes:
- "Car Theft" Event: A new, risky opportunity to earn money has appeared in the city. During the event, find suitable cars, steal them, and deliver them to the drop-off points before you're stopped. The cleaner your job, the higher the reward.
- "Lost Cargo" Event: Planes periodically fly over the city, dropping valuable cargo containers. Get to the drop-off point, open the container, collect the loot, and deliver it to the drop-off point. But be prepared: such cargo can be quite a hunt.
- Angel
